content.query:
CREATE VIEW     v_SCA_AE_Cost
AS

-- drop view v_SCA_AE_Cost

SELECT			X.*, Y.CostValue as [Cost ECM]
FROM
(
SELECT			A.Division, A.Company, [Customer ID], [Customer Name], [Customer PO], [Order ID], A.Date
,				A.Brand, [Product Category], A.[Part ID], [Part Description], [Supplier ID], MAX([Sales Amt]) as [Sales Amt]
,				MAX([Sales Qty]) as [Sales Qty], MAX([Cost AFS]) as [Cost AFS], MAX(B.Date) as IntercoDate_ECM
FROM
(
SELECT			DISTINCT DF.Division as Division
,				DF.Company as Company
,				AC.Customer as [Customer ID]
,				AC.Name as [Customer Name]
,				ATD.CustomerPoNumber as [Customer PO]
,				ATD.SalesOrder as [Order ID]
,				ATD.InvoiceDate as [Date]
,				CASE WHEN DF.Brand = 'OMEGA' THEN 'OMEGA AFS'
                WHEN DF.Brand = 'EXCALIBUR' THEN 'EXCALIBUR AFS'
				ELSE DF.Brand END AS [Brand]
,				DF.Category as [Product Category]
,				ATD.StockCode collate database_default as [Part ID]
,				IM.Description as [Part Description]
,				Supplier as [Supplier ID]
,				NetSalesValue as [Sales Amt]
,				QtyInvoiced as [Sales Qty]
,				CostValue/NULLIF(QtyInvoiced,0) as [Cost AFS]
FROM			SCA.ArTrnSummary ATS
JOIN			SCA.ArTrnDetail ATD on ATS.Invoice = ATD.Invoice
JOIN			SCA.ArCustomer AC on ATS.Customer = AC.Customer
JOIN			SCA.InvMaster IM on ATD.StockCode = IM.StockCode
JOIN			SCA.Division_Family DF on ATD.ProductClass = DF.ProductClass
WHERE			ATD.InvoiceDate >= '2019-01-01'
AND				AC.Customer NOT IN ('EDGECOR', 'GREEWOR')
AND				IM.StockCode <> 'WOT'
AND				DF.Company = 'A'
AND             NetSalesValue > 0
AND             DF.Brand = 'OMEGA'
) A

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT			'A' as Company
,				'Commercial' as Division
,				P.ID collate database_default as [Part ID]
,				MAX(COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE) as [Date]
,				MAX(CPC.COST) as CostValue
FROM			ECM.CUSTOMER_ORDER CO
JOIN			ECM.CUST_ORDER_LINE COL on CO.ID = COL.CUST_ORDER_ID
JOIN			ECM.PART P on COL.PART_ID = P.ID
JOIN			ECM.COST_BY_PART_CONSUMER CPC on P.ID = CPC.ID
WHERE			P.USER_1 IN ('OMEGA')
AND				CO.CUSTOMER_ID IN ('ASB001')
AND             COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE >= '2021-05-01'
GROUP BY		FORMAT(COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE, 'yyyy-MM'), P.ID
) B				on A.Company = B.Company and A.Division = B.Division and A.[Part ID] = B.[Part ID]
WHERE			Brand IN ('OMEGA AFS')
AND				B.Date <= A.Date
GROUP BY		A.Division, A.Company, [Customer ID], [Customer Name], [Customer PO], [Order ID], A.Date
,				A.Brand, [Product Category], A.[Part ID], [Part Description], [Supplier ID]
) X

JOIN

(
SELECT			'A' as Company
,				'Commercial' as Division
,				P.ID collate database_default as [Part ID]
,				MAX(COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE) as [Date]
,				MAX(CPC.COST) as CostValue
FROM			ECM.CUSTOMER_ORDER CO
JOIN			ECM.CUST_ORDER_LINE COL on CO.ID = COL.CUST_ORDER_ID
JOIN			ECM.PART P on COL.PART_ID = P.ID
JOIN			ECM.COST_BY_PART_CONSUMER CPC on P.ID = CPC.ID
WHERE			P.USER_1 IN ('OMEGA')
AND				CO.CUSTOMER_ID IN ('ASB001')
AND             COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE >= '2021-05-01'
GROUP BY		FORMAT(COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE, 'yyyy-MM'), P.ID
) Y				on X.Company = Y.Company and X.Division = Y.Division and X.[Part ID] = Y.[Part ID] and X.IntercoDate_ECM = Y.Date
